Configuration:
  pulumi:pulumi:Stack: (same)
    [urn=urn:pulumi:dev::myproject::pulumi:pulumi:Stack::myproject-dev]
- aws:s3/bucketObject:BucketObject: (delete)
    [id=myobject-id]
    [urn=urn:pulumi:dev::myproject::aws:s3/bucketObject:BucketObject::myobject]
    - aws:s3/bucket:Bucket: (delete)
        [id=mybucket-id]
        [urn=urn:pulumi:dev::myproject::aws:s3/bucket:Bucket::mybucket]
